market_pulse: Competitive nightclub activity moderate across Strip; Zouk and OMNIA show highest DJ engagement; LIV Beach gaining Saturday momentum with David Guetta.

content_gaps.description: Latin/Reggaeton crossover (Deorro x Latin Sundays) trending at OMNIA but not integrated into LIV's playlist strategy
content_gaps.suggested_action: Develop Latin house fusion content for LIV Beach weekend programming to capture emerging crossover trend

content_gaps.description: Talent residencies (Mathame at Zouk, Kygo at Palm Tree) creating sustained creator engagement; LIV has guest artists but not residency model
content_gaps.suggested_action: Pitch 4-week residency to mid-tier DJ (tech house focus) for LIV Beach May-June to build loyal social audience

content_gaps.description: Palm Tree and Tao Beach capitalizing on #VentureLuxury cabinet photo ops; LIV's Halo visual content underexploited for TikTok shorts
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch UGC campaign: '#HaloMoment' — incentivize 15-30s phone clips of LIV's signature Halo lighting, amplify via TikTok sounds
